---
title: "Generalized Linear Models and Extensions"
subtitle: "Track A — Biostatistics"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Generalized Linear Models and Extensions

**Track**: Track A — Biostatistics

The workhorse models of applied biostatistics: regression models for non-normal response data with rigorous theory of estimation, inference, and model checking.

## Table of Contents

1. Exponential Dispersion Family and Link Functions
2. Maximum Likelihood Estimation for GLMs
3. Logistic Regression
4. Poisson Regression and Count Data Models
5. Quasi-Likelihood and Generalized Estimating Equations
6. Penalized Regression: Ridge, LASSO, Elastic Net
7. Generalized Additive Models
8. Diagnostics, Residuals, and Model Checking

---

## Chapter 1: Exponential Dispersion Family and Link Functions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Maximum Likelihood Estimation for GLMs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Logistic Regression

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Poisson Regression and Count Data Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Quasi-Likelihood and Generalized Estimating Equations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Penalized Regression: Ridge, LASSO, Elastic Net

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Generalized Additive Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Diagnostics, Residuals, and Model Checking

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
